# TanStack Start docs

> Full-document SSR, Streaming, Server Functions, bundling and more, powered by TanStack Router and Vite - Ready to deploy to your favorite hosting provider.

- [Docs index](https://tanstack.com/start/latest/docs/index.md): This same Markdown index.
- [LLMs index](https://tanstack.com/start/latest/llms.txt): This same Markdown index.
- [Library home](https://tanstack.com/start/latest)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/tanstack/router)
- Packages: @tanstack/start-client-core.
- Frameworks: React, Solid.

Use this index as the routing layer for the docs. Fetch one linked Markdown page at a time, and prefer framework-specific pages when the user names a framework.

## Get Started

### Getting Started

- [React: Overview](https://tanstack.com/start/latest/docs/framework/react/overview.md)
- [React: Getting Started](https://tanstack.com/start/latest/docs/framework/react/getting-started.md)
- [React: Build from Scratch](https://tanstack.com/start/latest/docs/framework/react/build-from-scratch.md)
- [React: Comparison](https://tanstack.com/start/latest/docs/framework/react/comparison.md)
- [React: Start vs Next.js](https://tanstack.com/start/latest/docs/framework/react/start-vs-nextjs.md)
- [React: Migrate from Next.js](https://tanstack.com/start/latest/docs/framework/react/migrate-from-next-js.md)
- [Solid: Overview](https://tanstack.com/start/latest/docs/framework/solid/overview.md)
- [Solid: Getting Started](https://tanstack.com/start/latest/docs/framework/solid/getting-started.md)
- [Solid: Build from Scratch](https://tanstack.com/start/latest/docs/framework/solid/build-from-scratch.md)

- [React: Reading and Writing a File](https://tanstack.com/start/latest/docs/framework/react/tutorial/reading-writing-file.md)

- [Solid: Reading and Writing a File](https://tanstack.com/start/latest/docs/framework/solid/tutorial/reading-writing-file.md)
- [Solid: Fetching Data from External API](https://tanstack.com/start/latest/docs/framework/solid/tutorial/fetching-external-api.md)

## Examples

### Examples

- [React: Basic](https://tanstack.com/start/latest/docs/framework/react/examples/start-basic.md)
- [React: Basic + React Query](https://tanstack.com/start/latest/docs/framework/react/examples/start-basic-react-query.md)
- [React: Basic + Clerk Auth](https://tanstack.com/start/latest/docs/framework/react/examples/start-clerk-basic.md)
- [React: Basic + DIY Auth](https://tanstack.com/start/latest/docs/framework/react/examples/start-basic-auth.md)
- [React: Basic + Supabase Auth](https://tanstack.com/start/latest/docs/framework/react/examples/start-supabase-basic.md)
- [React: Trellaux + Convex](https://tanstack.com/start/latest/docs/framework/react/examples/start-convex-trellaux.md)
- [React: Trellaux](https://tanstack.com/start/latest/docs/framework/react/examples/start-trellaux.md)
- [React: WorkOS](https://tanstack.com/start/latest/docs/framework/react/examples/start-workos.md)
- [React: Material UI](https://tanstack.com/start/latest/docs/framework/react/examples/start-material-ui.md)
- [React: Basic + Auth.js](https://tanstack.com/start/latest/docs/framework/react/examples/start-basic-authjs.md)
- [React: Basic + Static rendering](https://tanstack.com/start/latest/docs/framework/react/examples/start-basic-static.md)
- [React: Cloudflare Vite Plugin](https://tanstack.com/start/latest/docs/framework/react/examples/start-basic-cloudflare.md)
- [Solid: Basic](https://tanstack.com/start/latest/docs/framework/solid/examples/start-basic.md)
- [Solid: Basic + Solid Query](https://tanstack.com/start/latest/docs/framework/solid/examples/start-basic-solid-query.md)
- [Solid: Basic + DIY Auth](https://tanstack.com/start/latest/docs/framework/solid/examples/start-basic-auth.md)
- [Solid: Basic + Supabase Auth](https://tanstack.com/start/latest/docs/framework/solid/examples/start-supabase-basic.md)
- [Solid: Basic + Convex + Better Auth](https://tanstack.com/start/latest/docs/framework/solid/examples/start-convex-better-auth.md)
- [Solid: Basic + Auth.js](https://tanstack.com/start/latest/docs/framework/solid/examples/start-basic-authjs.md)
- [Solid: Basic + Static rendering](https://tanstack.com/start/latest/docs/framework/solid/examples/start-basic-static.md)
- [Solid: Cloudflare Vite Plugin](https://tanstack.com/start/latest/docs/framework/solid/examples/start-basic-cloudflare.md)
- [Solid: Netlify Vite Plugin](https://tanstack.com/start/latest/docs/framework/solid/examples/start-basic-netlify.md)
- [Solid: Nitro Vite Plugin](https://tanstack.com/start/latest/docs/framework/solid/examples/start-basic-nitro.md)
